summary: Comprehensive testing of layout spacing bug fix and dark mode text contrast improvements across admin panel (all tabs), Store, Cart, and Portal pages. All spacing changes and dark mode text fixes verified working correctly.

dark_mode_verification.admin_dark_mode_toggle: Working - data-testid='dark-mode-toggle' ✓, adds aa-dark class to HTML element
dark_mode_verification.customers_tab_dark: ✓ all text readable, sections visually separated
dark_mode_verification.orders_tab_dark: ✓ stats cards, table header, content all readable
dark_mode_verification.subscriptions_tab_dark: ✓ stats cards, table, subscription notifications section readable
dark_mode_verification.tenants_dark: ✓ partner org cards readable, action buttons visible
dark_mode_verification.plans_dark: ✓ License Plans table with Free Trial plan readable
dark_mode_verification.cart_page_dark: ✓ CHECKOUT label and Your Cart title readable on blue hero
dark_mode_verification.portal_page_dark: ✓ My Account, stats cards, orders/subscriptions sections all readable with dark background

light_mode_regression.store_page: ✓ hero text readable on dark navy background, product grid visible below
light_mode_regression.cart_page: ✓ hero text readable, empty cart state visible

critical_code_review_comments: cart_hero data-testid='cart-hero' only renders when cart has items - empty state uses a different layout without the testid. This is expected behavior but worth documenting
UsersTab outer container (div data-testid='users-tab') does not have flex flex-col gap-4, but AdminPageHeader applies margin-bottom: 20px internally so visual spacing is acceptable
WebsiteTab content uses space-y-4 via TabsContent wrapper className rather than flex flex-col gap-4 on the tab content itself - works but inconsistent with other tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All spacing fixes (space-y-* → flex flex-col gap-*) verified working in admin panel. Dark mode toggle at data-testid='dark-mode-toggle' adds aa-dark class to HTML element. Hero text contrast fixes in index.css working correctly - store-hero and cart-hero get rgba(255,255,255,0.55/0.70) colors in dark mode. Portal page has gap-10 (40px) spacing. Store page has gap-8 (32px) outer spacing. Partner code: automate-accounts. Admin: admin@automateaccounts.local/ChangeMe123!. PLATFORM section in sidebar contains Partner Orgs and Plans tabs (requires platform_super_admin role).
